note: Reference manifest for the agent. Two layers. FOUNDATIONAL skills are Made Well's own and always available — the loop machinery (mode: workflow) that runs the lifecycle, plus the thinking lenses (mode: lens). PACK skills load only with a domain pack and may be scoped to a striation. Paths are relative to .madewell/.

skills.name: discovery
skills.when: Brain dump, unstructured input, first session. Shapes raw input into items on the discovery queue.

skills.name: session-start
skills.when: Every session, first thing. Re-enter the paused loop — inner loop first (active Cycle), else the discovery queue, else fresh.

skills.name: session-end
skills.when: Every session, before closing. Pause the loop; persist the outer store and any active cycle store; write the handoff.

skills.name: land
skills.when: At every Verify→Land — the moment a unit is done. Ship the brick, delete its cycle store + brief, drain the queue, reflect the nutrient (LEARNED/PROPAGATED/TAX → work/tax.jsonl), check the file-decidable walls. Per-unit, not per-session.

skills.name: orchestrate
skills.when: Parallel execution. 'Fan this out', 'create a workflow'. Carves packages and delegates to independent sub-agents.

skills.name: substrate-start
skills.when: Every session, after reading the memory stack. Reconciles execution state from the event log (the log wins over the store).

skills.name: substrate-end
skills.when: Every session, before updating madewell.json. Logs completion events first, so truth survives a crash.

skills.name: luck
skills.when: Always include when stuck, when something feels off, when hidden patterns need surfacing.

skills.name: criticality
skills.when: Person seems overwhelmed (too many threads) or stuck (signal vanishing). Read the state, not the person.

skills.name: systems-thinking
skills.when: Recurring problems, fix-one-break-another, complex tradeoffs, many moving parts.

skills.name: reframing
skills.when: Stated problem feels like the wrong problem. Something keeps hitting walls.

skills.name: blind-spots
skills.when: Before major decisions. When something feels too smooth. 'What am I missing?'

skills.name: challenging-assumptions
skills.when: Before committing to an approach. Stress-testing a plan. 'Poke holes in this.'

skills.name: exploring-possibilities
skills.when: Early brainstorm, creative block, 'what are our options here'.

skills.name: debug-hypothesis
skills.when: Something is broken. Error pasted. Unexpected behavior. Observe → hypothesize → experiment → conclude; never bulldoze.

skills.name: enforcer
skills.when: After significant work, before anything ships. 'Is this good?' The dev pack's quality jump pack. Stateful — tracks progress in enforcer-state.json.

packs.name: guide
packs.fills: the Persona slot — the GUIDE register (novice-human)
packs.activate: Read at session start. Made Well's batteries-included default; recommended for any non-technical builder.
packs.when: Persona slot, novice-human register: warm concierge, teaches through doing. The kernel itself is persona-free. Sibling registers: Contributor (carried by the dev pack) and naked (machines/CI).

packs.name: dev
packs.persona: packs/dev/persona.md (the Lead + Contributor registers — fills the Persona slot when loaded)
packs.when: Building software — any stack. Carries the Lead/Contributor (expert-human) registers and the coding jump pack (enforcer). Loading it swaps the Persona slot from Guide to a dev register unless the profile overrides.
